author: mradassaad
name: Mamba-3 Hybrid + Full Hessian GPTQ + Late QAT + Linear Warmdown
blurb: Best SSM submission: 7x Mamba-3 SISO SSD + 1 attention hybrid with Full Hessian GPTQ, late QAT (LR-triggered fake quantization), and linear warmdown. Closes 174 mBPB quantization gap to effectively zero.
